records.label: Profile Fit
records.description: Alignment between borrower profile and funding family.

records.label: Readiness Fit
records.description: Fit based on revenue, time, bank activity, structure, and documents.

records.label: Review Flag Fit
records.description: Review flags reduce confidence and may trigger manual review.

records.label: Use Case Fit
records.description: Funding purpose influences the suggested path.
